verdict.summary: The prior round's major finding is resolved. Non-conflict transient failures (HTTP 5xx, 429, and rate-limit 403 responses) now receive bounded, jittered retries, while permanent failures still fail immediately and genuine CAS conflicts retain their separate deadline-bound retry path. The new self-tests are non-vacuous: they prove recovery after a transient 502, termination and alerting after persistent 503 responses, exact PUT/backoff counts, classifier boundaries, and preservation of the real terminal error. I found no new correctness, soundness, fail-closed, or security issue in the diff.
